title: stachys buttleri
intro: Stachys buttleri, commonly known as wood betony or mountain betony, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its health benefits include reducing stress, improving sleep, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Stachys buttleri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
